name: Sirocco
description: A silent, pistol-style Amp for the Drifter. Generates its own ammunition from Void energy. A precisely timed reload over-charges the next shot.

drops.location: Cephalon Simaris, Complete The New War

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sirocco reload sound FX playing at incorrect time when equipped on Operator.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing VFX on the Sirocco Amp.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sirocco’s bullet entry points not aligning with the crosshair in The New War quest.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed crash when attempting to copy Operator suit colors to Sirocco. 
Slightly increased the Sound FX volume of the Sirocco amp.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sirocco Amp Skin overriding the sound FX of the Amp it's equipped to.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.changes: If the player has the Mote Amp equipped: “You have a Mote Amp equipped. Consider equipping a stronger Amp, such as the Sirocco.”

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed option to equip the Sirocco Amp skin on the Sirocco Amp.
Fixed Sirocco Amp detaching from the Operator arm on Codex scanner equip.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Hotfix 31.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a duplicate entry for the Sirocco in the Primary Profile category.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing animations when carrying Datamass while using the Sirocco.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to cycle the Profit Taker's current Shield vulnerability with the Sirocco.
